items.prompt: I study at the history faculty.
The physics department is on the third floor.
items.answer: Кафедра физики находится на третьем этаже.

items.prompt: The dean signed an important document.
The rector spoke before the students.
The professor gives the lecture very loudly.
The associate professor leads our literature seminar.
items.answer: Доцент ведёт наш семинар по литературе.

items.prompt: My brother is a PhD student in the chemistry department.
items.answer: Мой брат — аспирант на кафедре химии.

items.prompt: My classmate lives in the dormitory.
The lecture was interesting but long.
At the seminar we discuss texts.
I write notes at every lecture.
items.answer: Я пишу конспект на каждой лекции.

items.prompt: The new academic year begins in September.
items.answer: Новый учебный год начинается в сентябре.

items.prompt: This semester ends in January.
I am in the second year of study.
My major is economics.
In a year I will get my diploma.
The diploma defense will be in June.
I am writing a term paper in literature.
The PhD student is writing a long dissertation.
Tomorrow I have a credit test in physics.
items.answer: Завтра у меня зачёт по физике.

items.prompt: He will have a retake in August.
items.answer: У него будет пересдача в августе.

items.prompt: The winter exam session will begin soon.
The entrance exam was very difficult.
I passed the final exam in mathematics.
items.answer: Выпускной экзамен по математике я сдал.

items.prompt: He is a graduate of our university.
The first-year student looked for the lecture hall for a long time.
The lecture hall was full of students.
I live in a student dormitory.
We have lunch in the cafeteria every day.
items.answer: Мы обедаем в столовой каждый день.

items.prompt: This month I received a scholarship.
items.answer: В этом месяце я получил стипендию.

items.prompt: Higher education is very important.
Studies take a lot of time.
I want to enroll in university.
She was admitted to the medical faculty.
Tomorrow I am taking the physics exam.
items.answer: Завтра я сдаю экзамен по физике.

items.prompt: He passed all the exams with top marks.
items.answer: Он сдал все экзамены на пятёрки.

items.prompt: I do not want to fail this exam.
items.answer: Я не хочу провалить этот экзамен.

items.prompt: Tomorrow he will defend his diploma.
We are researching a new material in the laboratory.
items.answer: Мы исследуем новый материал в лаборатории.

items.prompt: Students analyze texts at the seminar.
At the lecture we discuss difficult questions.
items.answer: На лекции мы обсуждаем сложные вопросы.

items.prompt: The professor is proving his theory.
I am comparing two different methods.
I will give a presentation tomorrow.
items.answer: Я буду выступать с докладом завтра.

items.prompt: His presentation was very interesting.
I read a scientific article about space.
items.answer: Я прочитал научную статью о космосе.

items.prompt: This is a serious scientific work.
Higher education is expensive.
The academic year lasts nine months.
I study at Moscow University.
